overview: A highly respected and rigorous 10+ year journey focusing on the diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of illnesses.

roadmap.title: Stream Selection & Foundation
key_actions: Master NCERT Textbooks for Biology, Chemistry, and Physics.
Enroll in NEET coaching or structured self-study programs.

roadmap.title: NEET-UG Examination
roadmap.description: The singular gateway to all recognized medical colleges in India.
alternatives_if_low_score: Take a drop year to prepare again
Opt for BDS (Dental), BAMS (Ayurveda), or BHMS (Homeopathy)
Pursue MBBS abroad (requires clearing FMGE/NExT later)

roadmap.title: MBBS Degree
roadmap.description: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery.

phases.name: Compulsory Rotating Internship
focus: Hands-on clinical experience across various hospital departments

roadmap.exit_exam: NExT (National Exit Test) - Replacing NEET-PG for licensing and PG admissions.

roadmap.title: State/National Medical Council
roadmap.description: Mandatory registration to legally practice medicine in India.
key_actions: Register with State Medical Council or National Medical Commission (NMC)

roadmap.title: MD / MS Programs
roadmap.description: Required to become a specialist (e.g., Surgeon, Pediatrician).
